description_long: This object is a modern, tactical-style firearm with a compact, angular body and a prominent magazine extending from the lower receiver. The main body is matte black, featuring a stock at the rear, a pistol grip with ergonomic shaping, and a long, slender barrel at the front. The upper receiver includes a rail system for mounting optics or accessories, and a small sight is visible on top. The magazine is curved and robust, suggesting a high-capacity design. The trigger guard is thick and rounded, providing ample space for finger placement. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a sturdy and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, tactical black firearm with a curved magazine, ergonomic grip, and accessory rail, designed for urban use. Features a robust stock, long barrel, and prominent trigger guard.
description_view_0: Narrow end-on view showing the slim profile of the barrel and stock, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the firearm, including the stock, grip, magazine, trigger guard, and barrel, as well as the top-mounted sight.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, again showing the slim profile, with the magazine and grip barely visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite side, revealing the same major features as view 1 but from the other side, including the stock, grip, magazine, and barrel.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with ergonomic shaping, likely made of textured polymer for a secure hold. It features subtle finger grooves and a slightly flared base for improved control. The surface appears matte and may have stippling or checkering for enhanced grip, though no visible logos or embellishments are present.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and rounded, with a thick profile that provides ample space for finger placement. It lacks undercuts or squared-off edges, presenting a smooth, continuous curve. No visible texturing or reinforcement is apparent, and it appears to be integrated seamlessly with the lower receiver.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and slender, extending well beyond the main body. It has a standard, non-threaded profile with a smooth exterior and no visible compensators or porting. The finish is matte black, matching the rest of the firearm, and no external markings are visible.
attribute_slide_markings: No visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions are present on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers apparent in the images.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is slightly flared and robust, with a flat bottom and subtle contouring for easy insertion and removal. There are no visible finger rests, logos, or texturing, and the design is utilitarian and functional.
